package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for select_with_single_case: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `select { case v := <-ch: ... }` with only one case and no default
type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSelectWithSingleCaseModel
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseService struct {
    repo *CaseSelectWithSingleCaseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSelectWithSingleCaseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSelectWithSingleCase(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSelectWithSingleCaseDTO) error {
    focus := "select_with_single_case"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    select_single_case_positive := map[string]int{"select": 1, "single": 2, "case": 3}
    select_single_case_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    if len(items) > 0 {
        ch := make(chan string, 1)
        ch <- items[0].ID
        select {
        case value := <-ch:
            select_single_case_positive[value] = len(value)
        }
    }
    select_positive_0 := select_single_case_positive["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_positive_0
    single_positive_1 := select_single_case_positive["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_positive_1
    case_positive_2 := select_single_case_positive["case"] + len(input)
    _ = case_positive_2
    return nil
}
